'''Loli''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], while still a teenager and just back from the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Jedi Trials]], Loli was among the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who were present at the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Ossus Academy]] when the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]]—GAG—attempted to secure it, holding the students hostage. Loli was on guard duty when GAG [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Salle Serpa]] moved against the Jedi, and was killed by snipers.<ref name="dante" />
